scope: ACL 2027 supplement page 39 theory evidence bridge v2 visual-density iteration

motivation.target_page_before: Round 14 density audit ranked page 39 as the lowest non-reference page after the metric-boundary bridge v2 pass.
motivation.goal_alignment: Use a text-free AI theory-evidence lens slot plus additional registered selected-failure render pairs to make the hypothesis-level theory bridge less sparse without changing the evidence boundary or page count.

measurement.layout_guard_active_definition: RGB pixels where max(channel)-min(channel) > 15 or mean(channel) < 238, matching tests/test_paper_layout.py figure-density checks
measurement.page_active245_definition: RGB pixels where max(channel)-min(channel) > 15 or mean(channel) < 245, used for sparse-page raster review
measurement.red_pixel_fraction_definition: RGB pixels where R > 150, G < 90, and B < 90

claim_boundary.paper_use: visual reading guide linking hypothesis-level interpretation to material, grounding, navigation, and selected-failure render evidence
claim_boundary.notes: The theory-evidence lens AI slot is schematic reading structure only. Evidence-bearing panels remain registered render crops and deterministic overlays composed by paper/shared/figures/gen_supplement_task_media_atlases.py.

theory_evidence_lens.role: AI-generated theory-evidence lens schematic only; deterministic figure code draws paper labels, boundary text, and all evidence-source annotations.

final_figure.local_visual_evidence: The standalone v2 bridge adds a theory-evidence lens strip and a selected-failure anchor wall while preserving the material salience, grounding contract, and embodied sensitivity bands. The page-scale labels and render pairs remain contained without visible overlap.

pdf_review.local_visual_evidence: Rendered page 39 is visibly denser, the enlarged bridge remains on one page, the caption stays complete, and pages 38 and 40 show no spill, clipping, or float-order regression.

post_review_density_audit.page39_status: Page 39 no longer appears in the lowest 12 pages after the theory-evidence bridge v2 placement.

tests.result: RED first for the missing selected-failure render wall and source registration; GREEN after implementation with 2 passed, 72 deselected.
completed from paper/venues/acl27; paper/venues/acl27/build/supplement.pdf contains 45 A4 pages.
completed; pages 38-40 regenerated for local visual and density review.
completed; page 39 regenerated at 90 dpi for direct comparison with the round 14 density baseline.
completed; round 15 full-density audit places page 39 outside the lowest 12 pages.

review_mode.reason: Local pure visual review was used; no separate clean-room subagent was dispatched because independent delegation was not explicitly requested and the multi-agent tool only permits spawning under explicit delegation requests.

residual_risk: This pass improves page 39 but does not complete the broader supplement-wide visual iteration. Round 15 ranks page 14 as the next low-density non-reference page.
